tool_args.raw_text: Bridges and Tunnels Committee Work Plan

payload.title: Bridges and Tunnels Committee Work Plan
payload.description: Bridges and Tunnels Committee Work Plan for 2025, listing recurring and specific agenda items by month

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Bridges and Tunnels Committee
tool_args.raw_text: BRIDGES AND TUNNELS COMMITTEE WORK PLAN

payload.description: Bridges and Tunnels Committee of the MTA

tool_args.label: Approval of Minutes - Recurring
tool_args.raw_text: Approval of Minutes

payload.description: Approval of the official proceedings of the Committee Meeting.

tool_args.label: Diversity and Equal Opportunity Report - Recurring
tool_args.raw_text: Diversity and Equal Opportunity Report

payload.description: Summary of B&T workforce numbers, new hires, separations, ERG events and accomplishments, and complaints. Provided quarterly.

tool_args.label: Financial Report - Recurring
tool_args.raw_text: Financial Report

payload.description: Summary presentation of financial indicators for the month, including Balance Sheet, Accrual Statement of Operations, variance analysis, traffic volume, ridership, toll collection rates, and headcount charts.

tool_args.label: Operations Report - Recurring
tool_args.raw_text: Operations Report

payload.description: Summary of major B&T service indicators, including graphs and tables depicting total traffic for all facilities, average daily traffic by method of payment and vehicle type, traffic by facility, and data on factors that can impact B&T traffic such as weather and gasoline prices.

tool_args.label: Procurements - Recurring
tool_args.raw_text: Procurements

payload.description: List of procurement action items requiring Board approval. Non-competitive items listed first, followed by competitive items, then ratifications.

tool_args.label: Safety Report - Recurring
tool_args.raw_text: Safety Report

payload.description: Compilation of key leading and lagging customer and employee safety indicators, including collision rates, employee lost time injury rates, and leading indicators for roadway and fire safety.

tool_args.label: January 2025 - 2024 Accomplishments
tool_args.raw_text: 2024 Accomplishments - Summary of accomplishments for 2024.

payload.description: Summary of accomplishments for 2024.

tool_args.label: January 2025 - Approval of Work Plan for 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Approval of Work Plan for 2025 - The Committee will be requested to approve the amended work plan for the year.

payload.description: The Committee received a draft work plan for 2025 at the December 2024 meeting. The Committee will be requested to approve the amended work plan for the year.

tool_args.label: February 2025 - 2025 Adopted Budget and February Financial Plan 2025-2028
tool_args.raw_text: 2025 Adopted Budget and February Financial Plan 2025-2028

payload.event_name: 2025 Adopted Budget and February Financial Plan 2025-2028
payload.description: Present revised 2025 Adopted Budget and Financial Plan which incorporates any changes made by the Board at the December 2024 meeting and any agency technical adjustments.

tool_args.label: February 2025 - 2024 B&T Operating Surplus
tool_args.raw_text: 2024 B&T Operating Surplus - The Committee will recommend action to the Board.

payload.description: The Committee will recommend action to the Board.

tool_args.raw_text: Operating Performance

payload.description: Present update on operations, maintenance, and construction.

tool_args.label: May 2025 - Final Review of 2024 Year-End Operating Budget Results
tool_args.raw_text: Final Review of 2024 Year-End Operating Budget Results

payload.event_name: Final Review of 2024 Year-End Operating Budget Results
payload.description: The customary review of prior year's budget results and their implications for current and future budget performance. Each Agency will present a review of its financial performance. MTA Finance will prepare an overall review.

tool_args.label: November 2025 - 2026 Proposed Committee Work Plan
tool_args.raw_text: 2026 Proposed Committee Work Plan - The Committee Chair will present a draft Bridges and Tunnels Committee Work Plan for 2026.

payload.description: The Committee Chair will present a draft Bridges and Tunnels Committee Work Plan for 2026 that will address initiatives to be reported throughout the year.

tool_args.raw_text: 2026 Approval of Committee Work Plan - The Committee will be requested to approve the amended work plan for the year.

tool_args.label: Recurring Agenda Item Responsibilities
tool_args.raw_text: Recurring Agenda Items: Approval of Minutes, Committee Work Plan, Report on Operations, Safety Report, Financial Report, Procurements - Responsibility: Committee Chair & Members, Facility Mgt & Tolling Mgt, Env, Health & Safety, MTA Finance, MTA Procurement

payload.claim_text: Recurring agenda items (Approval of Minutes, Committee Work Plan, Report on Operations, Safety Report, Financial Report, Procurements) are the responsibility of Committee Chair & Members, Facility Mgt & Tolling Mgt, Env, Health & Safety, MTA Finance, and MTA Procurement.
